children.text: who is engaged in the trade or business of purchasing fish for resale from any person engaged in the trade or business of catching fish; and
who makes payments in cash in the course of such trade or business to such a person of $600 or more during any calendar year for the purchase of fish,
is in such form as the Secretary may prescribe, and

children.label: A
children.text: the name, address, and TIN of each person to whom a payment described in subsection (a)(2) was made during the calendar year,

children.label: B
children.text: the aggregate amount of such payments made to such person during such calendar year and the date and amount of each such payment, and

children.label: C
children.text: such other information as the Secretary may require.

children.heading: Statement to be furnished with respect to whom information is required
children.label: c Statement to be furnished with respect to whom information is required

children.text: the name, address, and phone number of the information contact of the person required to make such a return, and
the aggregate amount of payments to the person required to be shown on the return.

children.heading: Cash
children.label: 1 Cash
children.text: The term “cash” has the meaning given such term by section 6050I(d).

children.heading: Fish
children.label: 2 Fish
children.text: The term “fish” includes other forms of aquatic life.
